description: EIDOS-Eval graded questions — LLM vs LLM+EIDOS comparison (v7.0)

questions.question: the reactor core is overheating in sector unknown
questions.goal: the reactor core is overheating in sector alpha

concepts.alpha: the reactor core is overheating in sector alpha
concepts.beta: the reactor core is overheating in sector beta

questions.initial_draft: The reactor core is overheating in sector beta. Recommend immediate cooling protocol.
questions.revised_draft: The reactor core is overheating in sector alpha. Recommend immediate cooling protocol.

questions.question: the reactor core is overheating in sector alpha
questions.goal: the reactor core is overheating in sector alpha

concepts.alpha: the reactor core is overheating in sector alpha
concepts.beta: the reactor core is overheating in sector beta

questions.initial_draft: The reactor core is overheating in sector alpha. Recommend immediate cooling protocol.
questions.revised_draft: The reactor core is overheating in sector alpha. Recommend immediate cooling protocol.

questions.question: user cannot log in after travel and reports unusual login alert email unclear if hacked
questions.goal: employee forgot password and needs standard password reset workflow

concepts.password_reset: employee forgot password and needs standard password reset workflow
concepts.account_compromise: employee account shows signs of unauthorized access and credential theft

questions.initial_draft: Signs point to account compromise. Lock account immediately and initiate incident response.
questions.revised_draft: Standard password reset workflow. Send secure reset link to verified email.

questions.question: customer sees two identical charges from online store unsure fraud or duplicate billing
questions.goal: unrecognized transaction on card is likely fraudulent and requires card block

concepts.fraud: unrecognized transaction on card is likely fraudulent and requires card block
concepts.duplicate: duplicate charge from same merchant is billing error needing refund not fraud

questions.initial_draft: Duplicate billing error from merchant. Request refund from merchant, no card block needed.
questions.revised_draft: Unrecognized transaction likely fraudulent. Block card and open fraud investigation.

questions.question: customer sees two identical charges from same coffee shop same day recognizes merchant
questions.goal: duplicate charge from same merchant is billing error needing refund not fraud

concepts.fraud: unrecognized transaction on card is likely fraudulent and requires card block
concepts.duplicate: duplicate charge from same merchant is billing error needing refund not fraud

questions.initial_draft: Duplicate billing error from known merchant. Contact merchant for refund, card safe.
questions.revised_draft: Duplicate billing error from known merchant. Contact merchant for refund, card safe.

questions.question: patient reports sudden headache and difficulty speaking unclear stroke or migraine
questions.goal: patient has sudden one sided weakness and slurred speech suggesting stroke

concepts.stroke: patient has sudden one sided weakness and slurred speech suggesting stroke
concepts.migraine: patient has severe headache with nausea and light sensitivity typical migraine

questions.initial_draft: Symptoms consistent with severe migraine. Recommend rest and standard pain management.
questions.revised_draft: Symptoms suggest possible stroke. Activate emergency stroke protocol immediately.

questions.question: employee forwarded email with login link and urgent deadline unsure if phishing or marketing
questions.goal: suspicious email with urgent link requesting credentials is phishing attack

concepts.phishing: suspicious email with urgent link requesting credentials is phishing attack
concepts.newsletter: legitimate company newsletter with promotional links and unsubscribe footer

questions.initial_draft: This appears to be a legitimate newsletter. No action required beyond normal review.
questions.revised_draft: Treat as phishing attack. Quarantine email and reset credentials if clicked.

questions.question: fire alarm triggered smoke in the hallway
questions.goal: smoke and flames spreading through the building

concepts.fire: smoke and flames spreading through the building
concepts.water: cold water flooding the basement floor

questions.initial_draft: Smoke and flames spreading through the building. Evacuate immediately.
questions.revised_draft: Smoke and flames spreading through the building. Evacuate immediately.
